{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": -1.0, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "La Violencia and the partisan-military convulsions", "reasoning": "La Violencia fragmented civil society into armed sectarian factions and the National Front narrowed pluralism, pushing society down; the state, unable to monopolize rural violence despite Rojas's coercive centralization and the elite-brokered pact, remained weak-to-moderate with a slight net decline."}
